creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 217802
librespeed.diff

Release notes are here:
https://github.com/librespeed/speedtest/releases/tag/5.2.1

- Fixed a bug that prevented telemetry_extra from being parsed correctly
- Fixed a bug that caused ultest to be ignored
- Port number for MySQL can be changed in telemetry_settings.phh

Poudriere testport looks good.
